testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Structure panel container exists in DOM after page load
testcase.classname: panel container exists in DOM after page load

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Structure overlay element exists in DOM
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Structure panel is not active (hidden) before opening
testcase.classname: panel is not active (hidden) before opening

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Structure FAB button exists when chat_bubble_enabled is true
testcase.classname: FAB button exists when chat_bubble_enabled is true

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close panel opens via openAgentBtn in user menu
testcase.classname: panel opens via openAgentBtn in user menu

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close panel contains conversation area, textarea, and send button
testcase.classname: panel contains conversation area, textarea, and send button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close panel contains tag strip
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close close button dismisses the panel
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close overlay click dismisses the panel
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close Escape key dismisses the panel
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Open & Close panel has role=dialog and aria-modal attributes
testcase.classname: panel has role=dialog and aria-modal attributes

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Send empty textarea does not post to api/rag.php
testcase.classname: empty textarea does not post to api/rag.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Send without selecting a source, send shows a notice instead of posting
testcase.classname: without selecting a source, send shows a notice instead of posting

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Send typing in textarea and pressing Enter does not post when no source selected
testcase.classname: typing in textarea and pressing Enter does not post when no source selected

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Send Clear button empties the conversation
OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Grid Context context bar is visible when on a grid page with data
testcase.classname: context bar is visible when on a grid page with data

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Agent Panel: Grid Context grid data opt-in checkbox appears when grid has rows
testcase.classname: grid data opt-in checkbox appears when grid has rows
